cargo_lock.changes: Added 35+ transitive dependencies for rand, governor rate-limiting, and subtle timing-safe comparison
cargo_lock.impact: Increased binary size and build time; introduced rand (0.8.5), governor (0.6.3), and tower_governor (0.4.3) for cryptographic randomness and rate limiting

cargo_toml.impact: Enables secure random token generation for mandatory authentication fallback

serve_rs.changes: Converted AppState.token from Option<String> to String (mandatory); refactored auth check to always validate; added token generation on startup if BOP_SERVE_TOKEN unset
serve_rs.impact: Breaking change - all requests now require Bearer token authentication; graceful fallback to random token eliminates unprotected server state

serve_smoke_rs.changes: Updated test assertions to expect mandatory auth header requirement and random token behavior
serve_smoke_rs.impact: Tests now validate that unauthenticated requests fail with 401 UNAUTHORIZED

security_hardening.description: Transitioned from optional to mandatory authentication with secure random fallback
security_hardening.implementation: Changed token type Option<String> → String; integrated subtle crate for constant-time comparison to mitigate timing attacks

graceful_defaults.description: Generate cryptographically secure random token if environment variable unset
graceful_defaults.benefit: Eliminates need for external configuration while maintaining security; server is never unprotected

rate_limiting_infrastructure.description: Added tower_governor dependency alongside auth changes
rate_limiting_infrastructure.indication: Sets stage for distributed rate limiting on authenticated endpoints

token_discovery.issue: Randomly generated token must be communicated to client; if server logs are not inspected, token is inaccessible
token_discovery.workaround_needed: Consider exposing token via startup log output or HTTP endpoint for local testing

client_breaking_change.issue: All existing callers must now provide Authorization header; unauthenticated requests will fail
client_breaking_change.migration_required: Clients must update to include Bearer token or retrieve token from server startup

recommendations: Add logging or debug output on server startup to display the randomly generated token (for local development workflows)
Document token retrieval mechanism for callers that cannot access BOP_SERVE_TOKEN environment variable
Consider adding an optional /health endpoint that requires no auth for infrastructure health checks (Kubernetes liveness probes, etc.)
Verify rate limiting integration with tower_governor is wired correctly in production before deploying
Add integration test validating that repeated failed auth attempts trigger rate limiting (leveraging newly added governor crate)
Review deployment documentation to ensure BOP_SERVE_TOKEN is injected into all environments or token rotation strategy is documented
